name: Backlog MCP Server (Official Nulab)
what_it_does: Official Backlog MCP server from Nulab enabling AI agents to interact with Backlog project management platform — querying issues and tasks, managing projects, reading wiki pages, tracking milestones, accessing Git repositories, and integrating Backlog's project management capabilities into agent-driven development workflow and team productivity automation.
use_cases: Querying Backlog issues and tasks from project management agents
Creating and updating issues from development workflow agents
Reading wiki documentation from knowledge management agents
Tracking project milestones and progress from reporting agents
Accessing Git repository information from code review agents
Monitoring issue status and team workload from operations agents
not_for: Teams using Jira, GitHub Issues, or other project management tools
Teams not using Backlog (primarily popular in Japan/Asia-Pacific)
Teams needing Backlog Gantt chart or resource management features
best_when: An agent needs to access Backlog project data — for issue tracking, project status monitoring, or development workflow integration.
avoid_when: You're using Jira, Linear, Asana, or GitHub Issues — Backlog is a specific PM platform popular in Japan/APAC.

auth.notes: Backlog API key from user profile settings. OAuth 2.0 also supported. API key included in request parameters. Space URL (subdomain) required. Access controlled by Backlog project membership and role.

pricing.notes: Backlog has a free tier for small teams. Paid plans for more users and projects. Official Nulab MCP server is open source and free.

performance.rate_limits: Not publicly documented; typical REST API throttling applies

known_agent_gotchas: Backlog space URL required — format is your-space.backlog.jp or backlog.com
Issue IDs include project key prefix (PROJ-123 format)
Backlog API uses numeric IDs internally — agents must resolve keys to IDs
Wiki pages use Backlog notation (not Markdown) by default
Project roles affect API access — agents must have appropriate project membership
Official Nulab MCP — well-maintained for Backlog specifically; limited third-party ecosystem
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key or OAuth 2.0. ISO27001 certified. Official Nulab MCP. Protect API key as secret. API key grants access to all Backlog spaces the user belongs to.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key or OAuth 2.0. ISO27001. Official Nulab MCP. Protect API key. Key grants access based on user's project membership and roles.
